scripts.dev:services: concurrently -k -n user,medication,notification -c blue,green,magenta "npm --prefix services/user-service run dev" "npm --prefix services/medication-service run dev" "npm --prefix services/notification-service run dev"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -k -n user,medication,notification,frontend -c blue,green,magenta,cyan "npm --prefix services/user-service run dev" "npm --prefix services/medication-service run dev" "npm --prefix services/notification-service run dev" "npm --prefix frontend run dev -- --host 127.0.0.1 --port 5173"
